title: Recognition of a Legitimate Successor
situation: After formal rites and consultation of tradition, Highborn Atabey identifies a candidate as ritually worthy to receive leadership.
knows: A legitimate succession moment has arisen in Corozal
The candidate meets sacred and customary criteria for investiture
The community requires a formally sanctioned Cacique
does_not_know: How the future Cacique will govern in practice
Whether all factions will remain loyal after investiture
